prompts.prompt: I need a confirmation dialog that asks "Are you sure you want to delete this item?" with cancel and delete buttons. The delete button should be destructive-styled.
Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
Form that disables submit until all required fields are valid
Create a team members list where hovering over a member's name shows a hover card with their avatar, role, email, and a "Message" button.
Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
Build a quantity selector for a shopping cart item. It should have a number input with increment/decrement, min of 1, max of 99. Changing the quantity should call an update API endpoint.
Create a product detail page with breadcrumb navigation showing Home > Category > Subcategory > Product Name. The page should have a header, product info section, and a back button.
Create a settings page with 3 sections. Each section needs a heading, a brief description, and some form controls. Use different heading levels for the page title vs section titles.
I need my page background to use the wash color from the theme. Right now wrapping my app in Theme doesn't change the page background — it stays white.
